x-enumeration-literals.name: Immediate Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied instantly to the customers balance.

Comment:
Example: Points credited instantly after a purchase.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Delayed Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied after a waiting period.

Comment:
Example: Cashback posted 30 days after transaction settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied only if certain conditions are met.

Comment:
Example: Bonus points applied only after spending exceeds $500 in a month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are accumulated over a period and applied together.

Comment:
Example: Monthly points credited in one batch at the end of the month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied as pending or provisional until final validation.

Comment:
Example: Points shown as pending until the transaction is confirmed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auto-Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are automatically applied according to predefined rules.

Comment:
Example: Cashback automatically credited to a savings account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Application
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are applied only when the customer requests or activates them.

Comment:
Example: Customer redeems points manually via an app or portal.
